nasb.text: For it will be pleasant if you keep them within you, That they may be ready on your lips.

esv.text: for it will be pleasant if you keep them within you, if all of them are ready on your lips.

cnv.text: 如果你心裡謹守， 嘴唇上常常誦念這一切，自會覺得甘美。

ccb.text: 铭记在心、随时诵咏， 方为美事。

csbs.text: 如果你心中谨守它们， 又随时预备在嘴唇上， 那实在美妙！
